content: NexusMods.App (archived 2026-02-20, read-only) used a Loadout model with event-sourcing for undo, SQLite backend, FS abstraction layer, single-process. Features: Loadouts, Collections download, Workspaces, Health Check, External Changes detection. Launched games: Stardew Valley, Cyberpunk 2077, Baldur's Gate 3, Bannerlord (NOT Bethesda CE first). Had Wine/Proton detection design for Linux.
